name: onboarding_uncooperative_dismissive
notes: Uncooperative-but-not-hostile owner: dismissive, minimal-effort answers during active field collection ('whatever', 'you figure it out') rather than the trust/scam challenge already covered by onboarding_hostile.json. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (pre-seeds an ACTIVE journey with a 2-entry queue: confirm business_type='sweets' + gap 'about' — VT-582 calibration fix, without --journey there is no onboarding_journey row and every reply is the D1 fallback) then `script <tenant> onboarding_uncooperative_dismissive.json`.

steps.note: Bare greeting with the queue already non-empty — presents the pending business_type confirm conversationally (no answer recorded yet).

steps.message: I dunno, whatever, you're the AI just sort it out
steps.note: Dismissive non-answer to the pending confirm. Expect a real, non-pushy reply (e.g. proceeding with the discovered guess or asking plainly again) — never coercive language demanding compliance.

steps.message: seriously just do whatever you think, I don't care
steps.note: Repeated dismissal. Expect the manager to move the conversation forward gracefully (e.g. proceed with the best available info, or ask one plain follow-up) without badgering or repeating the identical confirm verbatim a third time.
